case_title: SHEYMAN, ROZALIYA et al vs. BAIK, KIM et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHEYMAN, ROZALIYA SHEYMAN, ROMAN AS TO DEFENDANT BAIK, KIM DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-18-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-21-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-28-1994
ATTORNEY FILED THE WRONG SUMMONS ( 5 DAYS SUMMONS)

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-18-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON MAY-18-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR JUN-17-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-17-1994, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), SANCTIONS STAYED UNTIL 7/19/94. PLAINTIFF SAHLL NOTIFY DEFENDANT., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-19-1994 CONTINUED FROM JUN-17-1994 TO JUL-19-1994 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-19-1994, CONTINUED TO AUG-18-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 SANCTIONS STAYED. FOR ORDER FOR PUBLICATION. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-18-1994, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON AUG-18-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), COURT ORDER STAY ON SANCTIONS LIFTED, TOTAL AMOUNT OF SANCTIONS DUE ON OR BEFORE 9/19/94 IS $100.00 AND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED PER CRC 525., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-19-1994 CONTINUED FROM AUG-18-1994 TO SEP-19-1994 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
